sheet_name: แบบขยายบันได ST.3
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03_หน้า22.png
view_title: แปลนชั้น 1 บันได ST.3
grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/05บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03_หน้า00_gridline.json

elements.description: First flight of ST.3, steps numbered 1 through 10, rising with 'ขึ้น' (up) arrow from โถง (+0.60); tread dimension chain '9 @ 0.25 = 2.25' (9 equal treads of 0.25m depth). A separate step '11' is noted just past the flight, likely the first tread of the landing/return.
Right-side vertical dimension; overall span 2.20m matches this house's grid master D-C span (7.70-5.50=2.20) exactly

warnings: One of 2 views on this page; sibling is the 2nd-floor plan view _view2_st3_floor2_plan.json. Both are drawn at 1:50 (larger scale than the 1:25 WC/other stair detail sheets).

This is the main interior switchback stair (ST.3), confirmed here as the same stair referenced on both the ground floor plan (หน้า06, 'บันได_ST3_main') and 2nd floor plan (หน้า07, 'บันได_ST3_upper_run') -- the step numbering here (1-10 plus a separate '11') differs slightly from the floor plans' own numbering (which showed 1-8 on the ground floor and continuing 1-10/17-11 on the upper floor) -- read as printed on each respective sheet rather than force-reconciled; the discrepancy is likely due to this detail sheet's finer 1:50 scale showing individual winder/landing treads not distinguished at the 1:100 floor-plan scale.

This sheet is A-20 (not A-21/A-22 as in house #4, which needed 2 sheets for its equivalent ST.3) since this house's ST.3 fits on one sheet (2 plan views only, no separate section/detail view) -- one fewer sheet than house #4's stair-detail set.

CASCADE_2026-07-19: this sheet's printed chains are the SOURCE for two master dummy grids (per Makham's beam-endpoint rule): top chain 0.10+2.25 from grid3 -> landing west edge = 3'(8.35) (cross-checked = grid4-0.65 per S-11's landing_extension, exact agreement); right chain 0.10|0.90|0.20|0.90|0.10 -> stair lane-divider beam = D'(6.60). Landing extends past grid4 to grid4+0.40 (+0.10 wall = the 0.50 line) -- far edge not named as a grid, flagged in master.
